llm_advice.rationale: Implement pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM sequence as recommended by diagnosis, using qyh-style mapping with U shape {d,16}, avoiding explicit B.T, and accumulating low-rank with beta=1.
risk_controls: static_review enforces no hardcoded d, no explicit B.T, use cuBLAS directly
correctness_test on all 3 d values must pass with max_abs_err 0 and rel_l2_err 0
benchmark against baseline to verify any speedup
stop_conditions: candidate passes correctness and achieves aggregate speedup > 1.0 (any improvement)
or after 3 tuning attempts within family fail to improve

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
